utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: I mean , why should I let them meet him ? I mean , I bring a guy home , and within five minutes they are all over him . I mean , they are like ... coyotes , picking off the weak members of the herd .

emotion_cause.span: 1_I bring a guy home , and within five minutes they are all over him . I mean , they are like ... coyotes , picking off the weak members of the herd .

utterances.speaker: Paula
utterances.text: Listen . As someone who seen more than her fair share of bad beef , I will tell you : that is not such a terrible thing .

utterances.speaker: Paula
utterances.text: Come on , they are your friends , they are just looking out after you .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: I know . I just wish that once , I would bring a guy home that they actually liked .

emotion_cause.span: 4_I just wish that once , I would bring a guy home that they actually liked .

utterances.speaker: Paula
utterances.text: Well , you do realise the odds of that happening are a little slimmer if they never get to meet the guy ...
